text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woiya happy! Haiya lucky! Thank you,<n>Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Woiya happyyy! ☆ Haiya luckyyy! ☆<n>Thank you,
Shiraokiii! ☆

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, this Japanese spell is very difficult!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: By the way, what do these words mean<n>anyway?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meaning?! Well, let me rephrase it a<n>bit...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes to happy clappies! No more worries,<n>go! All
praise to the great Shiraoki!<n>Thank you!
